name: shared-aleph-tooling
description: Shared Aleph VM deployment, rootfs, and automation tooling monorepo.

scripts.build:publishable: pnpm --filter @le-space/shared-types run build:publish && pnpm --filter @le-space/aleph-bootstrap run build:publish && pnpm --filter @le-space/core run build:publish && pnpm --filter @le-space/rootfs run build:publish && pnpm --filter @le-space/browser run build:publish && pnpm --filter @le-space/node run build:publish && pnpm --filter @le-space/ui run build:publish
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @le-space/core test && pnpm --filter @le-space/shared-types test && pnpm --filter @le-space/aleph-bootstrap test && pnpm --filter @le-space/rootfs test && pnpm --filter @le-space/browser test && pnpm --filter @le-space/node test && pnpm --filter @le-space/ui test
